changelog: FULLY REDESIGNED payment screen — three simple step cards (1) Amount, (2) Email, (3) Order Number — laid out side-by-side on TV/tablet, stacked on phones, all visible at once with NO scrolling on any device.
Removed clutter: no more QR code, no copy buttons, no multi-line walls of text. You read the values off the screen, do the e-Transfer from your bank app — that's it.
Big high-contrast text sized so a senior can read every value from across the room. Adapts automatically to TVs (32-52 sp values), tablets (36 sp), and phones (26-30 sp).
"Check Now" + "Exit App" buttons always pinned at the bottom — fully responsive and always reachable.
